input.helperLead: Be clear about budget, use case, and comparison targets for faster, actionable recommendations.

hints.budgetText: Clear budget range leads to more focused results
hints.sceneText: Commuting, office work, or photography will significantly change recommendations
hints.compareText: You can name two models or two platforms directly

input.placeholder: Describe your shopping goal, e.g.: Help me find noise-cancelling earphones under $300
input.disclaimer: The agent may make mistakes, please verify important information

hero.headline: Turn complex shopping decisions into clear, actionable answers.
hero.description: Connects Google Shopping, Amazon, and eBay to compare prices, summarize reviews, and generate purchase recommendations — all in one conversation.
hero.platformNote: Search results, reviews, and price data are synthesized into an actionable conclusion.
hero.promptsText: Tell me your budget, use case, or preferences, and I'll organize platform prices, review signals, and a final recommendation.
examplePrompts: I need commuting noise-cancelling earphones under $300
Compare 27-inch monitors suitable for both gaming and office work
I want a phone for video recording under $700
Which platform is better for buying a PS5 right now?
